name: sketch (drums)
doc: Starter groove — tempo plus a kick / hat / snare stack.
example:
setcps(0.5)
stack(
  s("bd*4"),
  s("~ hh ~ hh").gain(.7),
  s("~ cp").room(.3),
)
insert:
setcps(0.5)
stack(
  s("bd*4"),
  s("~ hh ~ hh").gain(.7),
  s("~ cp").room(.3),
)

name: drums + bass
doc: Kick / hats with a filtered saw bassline.

name: melody (scale)
doc: Indices mapped onto a scale, played on piano.

name: arp from chords
doc: Voiced chords, arpeggiated.

name: euclid groove
doc: Euclidean kick under straight hats and a backbeat.
example:
stack(
  s("bd").euclid(3,8),
  s("hh*8").gain(.5),
  s("~ cp ~ cp").room(.2),
)
insert:
stack(
  s("bd").euclid(3,8),
  s("hh*8").gain(.5),
  s("~ cp ~ cp").room(.2),
)

name: sound
doc: Play a sample or synth by name.

name: note
doc: Play notes by name (c, e, g) or MIDI number.

name: n
doc: Index into a sample set or a scale.

name: stack
doc: Play several patterns at the same time.

name: cat
doc: Concatenate patterns — one per cycle (a.k.a. slowcat).

name: seq
doc: Sequence patterns within a single cycle (a.k.a. fastcat).

name: run
doc: Counts 0..n-1 as a pattern.

name: arrange
doc: Arrange sections, each lasting a number of cycles.

name: silence
doc: A pattern with nothing in it — useful with every/sometimes.

name: * (speed up)
doc: Repeat/speed up an event n times within its slot.

name: / (slow down)
doc: Stretch an event across n cycles.

name: ~ (rest)
doc: A silence / rest in the sequence.

name: [ ] (group)
doc: Group events into one slot (subsequence).

name: < > (alternate)
doc: Pick one value per cycle, in turn.

name: , (parallel)
doc: Stack events inside a group (play together).

name: ! (replicate)
doc: Repeat an event n times as separate steps.

name: @ (elongate)
doc: Give an event n steps of weight.

name: ( ) (euclid)
doc: Euclidean rhythm: k hits spread over n steps.

name: ? (degrade)
doc: Randomly drop the event (~50%).

name: : (sample index)
doc: Pick the i-th sample in a set.

name: fast
doc: Speed up the pattern by factor n.

name: slow
doc: Slow down the pattern by factor n.

name: rev
doc: Reverse the pattern within each cycle.

name: palindrome
doc: Play the cycle forwards, then backwards.

name: iter
doc: Shift the start point by 1/n each cycle.

name: rot
doc: Rotate the values left by n, keeping the rhythm.

name: ply
doc: Repeat each event n times in place.

name: segment
doc: Sample a continuous signal n times per cycle.

name: compress
doc: Squeeze the pattern into the a..b slice of the cycle.

name: zoom
doc: Play only the a..b slice, stretched to fill the cycle.

name: swingBy
doc: Add swing by delaying off-beats of an n-division.

name: jux
doc: Hard-pan: original on the left, fn(original) on the right.

name: off
doc: Overlay a copy shifted by time and transformed by fn.

name: superimpose
doc: Overlay the original with fn(original).

name: layer
doc: Stack several transformed copies of the pattern.

name: every
doc: Apply fn on every n-th cycle.

name: whenmod
doc: Apply fn when cycle % a is >= b.

name: chunk
doc: Apply fn to a different 1/n slice each cycle.

name: struct
doc: Impose a boolean rhythm (t/f or 1/0).

name: mask
doc: Silence events where the boolean pattern is false.

name: euclid
doc: Distribute the pattern over a Euclidean k-in-n rhythm.

name: euclidRot
doc: Euclidean rhythm rotated by rot steps.

name: add
doc: Add to numeric values (e.g. transpose notes).

name: ribbon
doc: Loop a len-cycle window of the pattern from start.

name: sometimes
doc: Apply fn to roughly half the events.

name: sometimesBy
doc: Apply fn to a probability p (0..1) of events.

name: often
doc: Apply fn ~75% of the time.

name: rarely
doc: Apply fn ~25% of the time.

name: someCycles
doc: Apply fn on random whole cycles.

name: degradeBy
doc: Randomly drop a fraction p of events.

name: degrade
doc: Randomly drop ~50% of events.

name: choose
doc: Continuous signal that picks randomly from the values.

name: scale
doc: Map n() indices onto a scale.

name: transpose
doc: Transpose notes by a number of semitones.

name: chord
doc: Build chords from symbols (use with .voicing/.arp).

name: voicing
doc: Turn chord symbols into actual voiced notes.

name: arp
doc: Arpeggiate chord notes in a given order.

name: gain
doc: Set loudness (0..1+). Patternable.

name: pan
doc: Stereo position from 0 (left) to 1 (right).

name: speed
doc: Playback speed / pitch; negative plays in reverse.

name: lpf
doc: Low-pass filter cutoff frequency.

name: hpf
doc: High-pass filter cutoff frequency.

name: lpq
doc: Low-pass filter resonance.

name: vowel
doc: Formant filter shaping a vowel (a e i o u).
example: note("c e g").vowel("<a e i o>")

name: room
doc: Reverb send amount.

name: size
doc: Reverb room size.

name: delay
doc: Echo / delay wet amount.

name: delaytime
doc: Delay time in cycles.

name: delayfeedback
doc: Delay feedback (0..1).

name: crush
doc: Bit-crush; lower n = crunchier (1..16).

name: shape
doc: Waveshaping distortion (0..1).

name: coarse
doc: Sample-rate reduction (1 = clean, higher = grittier).

name: orbit
doc: Route to a separate effects bus (own reverb/delay).

name: attack
doc: Amplitude envelope attack time.

name: decay
doc: Envelope decay time.

name: sustain
doc: Envelope sustain level (0..1).

name: release
doc: Envelope release time after note-off.

name: clip
doc: Scale note length relative to its step.

name: bank
doc: Choose a drum-machine bank for samples.

name: chop
doc: Chop each sample into n consecutive pieces.

name: striate
doc: Interleave n slices of the sample across the pattern.

name: slice
doc: Cut a sample into n parts, play them by index.

name: splice
doc: Like slice, but time-stretches slices to fit.

name: loopAt
doc: Stretch a sample to loop over n cycles.

name: begin
doc: Start playback this far into the sample (0..1).

name: end
doc: Stop playback at this point in the sample (0..1).

name: cut
doc: Choke group — new hit cuts others in the same group.

name: sine
doc: Continuous sine LFO, 0..1. Use .range to remap.

name: saw
doc: Rising (saw) or falling (isaw) ramp, 0..1.

name: tri
doc: Triangle LFO, 0..1.

name: square
doc: Square LFO alternating 0 and 1.

name: rand
doc: Continuous random value, 0..1.

name: perlin
doc: Smooth (perlin) noise signal, 0..1.

name: irand
doc: Random integer signal, 0..n-1.

name: range
doc: Remap a 0..1 signal onto lo..hi.

name: setcps
doc: Set global tempo in cycles per second.

name: setcpm
doc: Set tempo in cycles per minute.

name: hush
doc: Silence everything immediately.

name: color
doc: Tint this pattern's events in the visualizer.

name: _punchcard
doc: Draw the pattern as a punchcard/piano-roll overlay.
